posts.text: Today is March 18th, 2026 and Donald J. Trump is the President of the United States of America.

The Iranian theocracy was an imminent threat. 
They were committed to our destruction and anyone telling you otherwise is misleading you. 
Between their lethal plotting against US targets, their continued efforts to shield their attempt to reconstitute their nuclear program using ballistic missiles, their global terror support, and their destructive drone program, there’s zero doubt about the threat level. Zero.

Don’t miss the show today with @Shawn_Farash. 🔥👇🏻
